assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing trustify-backend entry in the Repository Registry unchanged (same Role, Serena Instance, Path values as in claude-md-configured.md)
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 16: '| trustify-backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/trustify-backend |' — matches the fixture values exactly (Role: Rust backend service, Serena Instance: serena_backend, Path: /home/user/trustify-backend).

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md adds a new trustify-ui entry to the Repository Registry with serena_ui as the Serena Instance
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md line 17: '| trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui |' — a new row is present with serena_ui as the Serena Instance column value.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves all existing Jira Configuration fields unchanged — Project key remains TC, Cloud ID, Feature issue type ID remain as in claude-md-configured.md
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 20-25 contain: 'Project key: TC', 'Cloud ID: 2b9e35e3-6bd3-4cec-b838-f4249ee02432', 'Feature issue type ID: 10142', 'Git Pull Request custom field: customfield_10875', 'GitHub Issue custom field: customfield_10747' — all match the fixture values exactly.

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md explicitly identifies which entries were preserved (existing) and which were added (new)
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md has an '## Added' section listing the new trustify-ui row ('Added row: trustify-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/trustify-ui') and a '## Preserved (unchanged)' section explicitly listing the existing trustify-backend row, all Jira Configuration fields marked '(preserved)', Code Intelligence content, and Bug Configuration fields marked '(preserved)'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md notes that serena_backend was already configured and serena_ui is newly discovered
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 23-24 under 'Step 2 -- Discover Serena Instances': '1. serena_backend -- already in Repository Registry, skipping' and '2. serena_ui -- NOT in Repository Registry, new instance discovered'.

assertion_results.text: The existing Code Intelligence section content (naming convention, example, serena_backend limitations) is preserved — only new serena_ui content is added
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 27-43: The naming convention ('Tools are prefixed by Serena instance name: mcp__<instance>__<tool>'), the serena_backend example (mcp__serena_backend__find_symbol call), and serena_backend limitation ('rust-analyzer may take 30-60 seconds to index on first use') are all preserved verbatim. Only one new line was added: 'serena_ui: No known limitations'.

assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing '## Bug Configuration' section with Bug issue type ID (10001), Bug template (docs/bug-template.md), and Bug-to-Task link type (Blocks) unchanged — the skill reports Bug Configuration is up to date
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 45-49: '## Bug Configuration' section contains 'Bug issue type ID: 10001', 'Bug template: docs/bug-template.md', 'Bug-to-Task link type: Blocks' — all match fixture values. discovery-log.md line 83: 'Result: Bug Configuration is up to date -- no changes needed.' confirms the skill reported it as up to date.

assertion_results.text: The skill offers Security Configuration opt-in since the existing CLAUDE.md has no '## Security Configuration' section, and respects the user's decline — no Security Configuration section appears in the output
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 87-91 (Step 10): 'Security Configuration does not exist in the current CLAUDE.md. Asked user whether to enable security triage. User response: declined. Result: Security Configuration skipped -- user declined.' changes-log.md lines 48-49 also confirm: 'Skipped: user declined when asked whether to enable security triage'. claude-md-result.md contains no '## Security Configuration' section anywhere in the file.
